reviews.comment:
Estoy es Puerto Pirámides, soy socio ACA y cliente YPF y me quieren obligar a comprar en el local para usar el baño, una VERGÜENZA!!!
La única en todo el país, deja mucho que desear la prepotencia de quién atiende, y la falta de respeto.

(Translated by Google)
I'm in Puerto Pirámides, I'm an ACA member and an YPF customer, and they're trying to force me to buy something at their store to use the restroom—it's a disgrace! It's the only one of its kind in the entire country, and the arrogance and lack of respect of the person working there leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bmMyanRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La unica Estacion de Servicio de la Villa Balnearia Puerto Piramides. A pesar de ser pequeña, tiene una excelente atencion y posee todos los tipos de combustibles, tiene un minimercado incorporado y los baños estan limpios, su griferia funciona. Tiene baños adaptados para personas con capacidades de movilidad reducida. Estacionamiento arbolado, parque de diversiones para niños cerca.

(Translated by Google)
The only service station in the Puerto Piramides beach resort. Despite its small size, it offers excellent service and stocks all types of fuel. It has a built-in convenience store, and the restrooms are clean and have working faucets. It has accessible restrooms. There is a tree-lined parking lot and a children's amusement park nearby.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRX096R1JBEAE

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible, they wouldn't even let you use the bathroom, and the attendant kept cursing because of a power outage. It was a disgrace.

reviews.comment:
No puede ser que el baño sea exclusivo de clientes. Esto me parecio muy mal. La puerta con cierre electronico? Da muy mala imagen a quien visita Puerto Piramides e ir a la YPF como primer parada y te reciban asi es de muy mal gusto. Les compre de todos modos porque lo iba a hacer. Pero corrijan esto porfavor, yo soy de Chubut y vuelvo sin problemas, pero no quiero imaginar la opinion de los turistas.... por ej la YPF de Garayalde, recibe mucha mas gente y tiene los baños publicos de libre acceso e impecables. Corrijanlo...

(Translated by Google)
It's unacceptable that the restroom is exclusively for customers. I found this very unacceptable. The door with an electronic lock? It gives a very bad impression to anyone visiting Puerto Pirámides, and going to the YPF as your first stop and being greeted like that is in very poor taste. I bought fuel anyway because I was going to. But please fix this. I'm from Chubut and I return without any problems, but I don't want to imagine the opinion of tourists... For example, the YPF in Garayalde receives many more people and has free and spotless public restrooms. Please fix this...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMWFEb2ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Si no sos socio , no me parece que no te dejen utilizar los baños.

(Translated by Google)
If you're not a member, I don't think they should stop you from using the restrooms.
